name: Exile from Eden
oracleText:
Exile target creature or enchantment.
Create a 1/1 white Angel creature token with flying.
flavorText: "So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubims, and a flaming sword..." — Genesis 3:24
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme uses a public-domain expulsion-from-Eden work via Wikimedia Commons.
